title: Squirrel Removal in New Brighton, Staten Island
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in New Brighton, Staten Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: New Brighton residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or crawl spaces can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for fast, humane removal services. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by Staten Island's urban squirrel populations and the older housing stock in the New Brighton neighborhood. We provide comprehensive squirrel removal starting at $900, with complete exclusion and damage repair services available.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served New Brighton and all of Staten Island for years, delivering humane, effective squirrel removal with a focus on long-term prevention. Our licensed technicians are familiar with the neighborhood's Victorian homes and multi-family buildings, ensuring tailored solutions that protect your property and prevent re-entry.
localContext: New Brighton's historic homes near St. George and the waterfront areas along the Kill Van Kull are particularly attractive to squirrels seeking shelter in older roof structures and mature trees. The neighborhood's mix of century-old Victorians and newer residential buildings requires specialized exclusion techniques to keep squirrels from exploiting gaps in soffits, vents, and rooflines.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in New Brighton typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in New Brighton homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in New Brighton due to the abundance of mature trees and older homes with accessible attics and roof gaps. Gray squirrels frequently nest in attics during colder months, causing insulation damage and noise disturbances for residents.

faqs.question: How do you remove squirrels humanely?
faqs.answer: We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. After removal, we seal all entry points with durable materials and can relocate squirrels according to New York State regulations. We never use poisons or inhumane methods.

faqs.question: Can you repair damage caused by squirrels?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our comprehensive service includes repairing chewed wiring, replacing damaged insulation, cleaning contaminated areas, and restoring entry points in soffits, fascia, and vents. We ensure your New Brighton home is returned to safe, squirrel-free condition with preventative measures in place.
